type_definitions.name: TrackBlobReader
type_definitions.description: Usecase-layer secondary port that reads PR branch blobs (spec.json / <layer>-types.json / impl-plan.json / architecture-rules.json) and decodes them into domain aggregates. Modified per ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D6.2 / T007: the historical `read_track_metadata` method is renamed to `read_impl_plan` and its return type switches from `BlobFetchResult<TrackMetadata>` to `BlobFetchResult<ImplPlanDocument>` so the task-completion merge gate can drive off the new impl-plan.json file instead of the identity-only metadata.json. `expected_methods` below intentionally reflects the **current** trait shape so the design commit stays Blue; T007's implementation commit replaces the `read_track_metadata` entry with `read_impl_plan` (catalogue updated in lockstep with the rust rename) and the `GitShowTrackBlobReader` adapter is adjusted the same way.
